title: Tosnail 18 Pack 6oz Plastic Champagne Flutes Champagne Glasses, 180ml Resuable Plastic Wine Glasses, Clear Wine Cups, Tall Drinking Cups for Parties
features: Package includes 18 clear plastic champagne flutes. Unit Size: 2"(5 cm) top dia. x 2.75"(7 cm) bottom dia. x 8.3"(21); Capacity: 6 fl oz/180ml. Stunning and elegant drinkware with timeless design for any casual or formal occasions.
CLEAN: NOT DISHWASHER SAFE! Simply wash with soap and warm water, air dry and reuse.

Premium Quality Champagne Glasses - Made from food safe plastic, BPA free and durable. Shatterproof design means they won't break or leave shards behind. Resuable composition makes clean up a lot easier, but they are also reusable to reduce cost.

Unique and Stylish - Stylish vertical grain texture will showcase your champagne, wine, martini, mimosas, Bloody Mary's, cocktails, margarita, mixed drinks, and more! You can even use them for parfaits, sundaes and desserts!
Enjoy Your Favorites - Ergonomic design allows you to drink your favorite beverages with great comfort. Served in these clear plastic drinking glasses is making your drinks look more attractive!

Great For Any Occasion - With such a fancy look, you'll never worry about having cups too drab or dull for even the classiest events. Great for after parties, nightclubs, bars, and other festive locales to serve with style.
Contact us at any time if you have any problems after receiving the product.
